title: Nikki's Cobblemon+
description: My Cobblemon mashup containing purely the essentials and ALOT of cobblemon addons
body:
TLDR: A mashup of optimization mods and Cobblemon addons to give you a purely vanilla+ cobblemon experience



- LEGENDARY POKEMON AND STRUCTURES
- GYM BATTLES
- RADICAL TRAINERS AND LEVEL CAP
- COBBLE CATS AND PARADOX COBBLEMON!
- ALPHA POKEMON
- RIDEABLE POKEMON!
- COBBLEMON BREEDING
- MEGA, PRIMALS, Z MOVES AND TERAS
- MOBS REACT TO YOUR COBBLEMONS
- FIGHT BYSIDE WITH YOUR COBBLEMON
- BADGES FOR CAPTURING AND DEFEATING DIFFERENT TYPES THAT GIVE BUFFS OUTSIDE OF BATTLE


Report bugs and send suggestions to luvlux on discord
